label: FRC-CSX-VVK
title: Automated Verification and Validation of Key Security Indicators

prose.en: Automated Verification and Validation of Key Security Indicators (requirement varies by certification class; see class tailorings and the class-variants payload).

a.statement: Providers seeking 20x Class A Certification MAY implement automated methods to persistently verify and validate the accuracy and completeness of Key Security Indicators.

b.statement: Providers seeking 20x Class B Certification SHOULD implement automated methods to persistently verify and validate the accuracy and completeness of Key Security Indicators with at least 1 automated method for each Key Security Indicator.

c.statement: Providers seeking 20x Class C Certification MUST implement automated methods to persistently verify and validate the accuracy and completeness of Key Security Indicators with at least 2 automated methods for each Key Security Indicator.

d.statement: Providers seeking 20x Class D Certification MUST implement automated methods to persistently verify and validate the accuracy and completeness of Key Security Indicators with at least 4 automated methods for each Key Security Indicator.
